text.title: Activation Metrics Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example walking from inputs to a signed-off `report` artefact, including a forced skip scenario.

example.p: A small B2B SaaS commissions a activation-metrics report for the period 2026-05-01..2026-05-22; analytics owner is named owner. Agent gathers warehouse query + KPI dashboard, confirms preconditions, computes metrics, writes findings, validates (exit 0), surfaces ready_for_review, analytics owner signs off.

list.item: Step 1 gather-inputs: preconditions report = all true
Step 2 apply-rules: decision-tree leaf -> conclusion ref="output-contract-binding"
Step 5 human-checkpoint: reviewer signs off, artefact lands at output location

example.p: Same team but the input brief omits the named owner field. Step 1 preconditions report flags `named-owner` rule as false. Agent returns an action=skip envelope per rule `skip-this-methodology` and yields control to the parent workflow.
